title: Stock Market News for Jun 12, 2026
summary: S&P 500 +1.8% to 7,393.30, Dow +930 pts to 50,848.75, Nasdaq +2.5%. Best day since April 8. 7 of 11 sectors negative despite index gains. VIX -2.2% to 19.44. SpaceX IPO priced at $135.

title: Markets News, June 11, 2026: U.S. Stocks Jump as Tech Shares Rebound
summary: Dow +930 pts, S&P 500 +1.8%, Nasdaq +2.5%. Trump cancelled Iran strikes. WTI -4.4% to $86.60, Brent -3% to $90.38. Gold +2.4% to $4,230. 10Y yield fell to 4.46%. DXY 99.67. Oracle -8.5% on AI spending concerns.

title: Equities rally, dollar dips with oil as Trump cancels Iran attacks
summary: MSCI All-Country World Index +1.16%. Wall Street biggest gain since April 8 ceasefire. 10Y -8.1bp to 4.457%. DXY -0.36% to 99.69. ECB delivered first rate hike in nearly 3 years. Jobless claims 229K.

title: Brent, WTI oil prices: Trump calls off Iran strikes
summary: WTI -3.9% to $86.51 in extended trading. Brent -4.2% to $89.15. Trump oscillated between deal talk and strike threats. Rystad: market better-positioned to absorb disruptions than in past crises.

title: Fed Signals Shift At June Meeting With Markets Pricing In 2026 Hike
summary: Fed set to remove easing bias at June 16-17 FOMC. Waller: 'inflation is not headed in the right direction.' Markets pricing 1-2 rate hikes in 2026. Warsh chairs first FOMC meeting.

title: Crypto Market Recovers 1.7%: Bitcoin Up, DeFi Rise 5.2%
summary: Total crypto MC $2.25T (+1.7%). BTC $63,283 (+1.78%). ETH $1,662 (+0.99%). Fear & Greed Index 12 (Extreme Fear) unchanged 3 days. DeFi MC +5.2% to $62.37B.

title: Iran war live: Trump claims Tehran deal 'approved', cancels new strikes
summary: Day 105 of war. Trump halted third night of strikes. MOU under review by Iranian Supreme Leader. KOSPI surged 4.6% on deal hopes. Iran: 'no final decision.' Naval blockade remains.

title: Trump now says a peace deal will be announced 'soon,' cancels further strikes
summary: Trump: deal on nuclear issues 'yes, conceptually.' Expert: 'manufacturing reality.' Same day threatened 'very hard' strikes. Naval blockade stays until deal signed.

title: SpaceX (SPCX) IPO: Live updates
summary: SpaceX IPO debuts on Nasdaq as SPCX. Priced $135/share, $75B raise (largest in history), $1.77T valuation. Oppenheimer: Outperform, $190 target. $250B+ in demand.

title: US Treasury Yield Curve Today: June 12, 2026
summary: 10Y 4.55%, 2Y 4.13%, 30Y 5.03%. 2s10s spread 42bp (positive, uninverted). Updated from FRED data.

title: ICE BofA US High Yield Index Option-Adjusted Spread
summary: HY OAS 2.78% as of June 9. IG OAS ~77bp as of mid-May. Corporate bond spreads remain compressed despite macro uncertainty.

title: Gold Spot (XAUUSD) Commodity Price & Market Analysis
summary: Gold closed $4,196.36 (+2.71%). Rebounded sharply from 6+ month low. Silver +5.51% to $67.20. Gold rallying on same day as equities - unusual divergence.

title: DXY Exchange Rate
summary: DXY 99.73 (-0.13%). Down 0.36% on June 11 as safe-haven demand faded on Iran deal hopes. EUR/USD 1.1579. USD/JPY 159.94.
